notice_board.name: Greyfen Notice Board
notice_board.greeting: A crow-picked contract hangs under a rusted nail. Someone has pressed a prayer charm into the wood beside it.
lines: Three men gone on the old road. One cart returned empty. Black feathers in the blood.
Payment on proof. Sister Anwen holds the names of the dead.

sister_anwen.name: Sister Anwen
sister_anwen.greeting: Keep your blade low in Greyfen, hunter. Fear already has hands around every throat here.
lines: The old road has taken three men and returned none whole. That is not hunger. Hunger is honest.
Look for the cart, the clawed mud, and the black feathers. If you find them together, come back before you chase the dark farther.
Do not ask yet why I know what marks to name. I am not ready to answer, and Greyfen is not ready to hear it.

mira.name: Mira Fen
mira.greeting: If you came for comfort, try the shrine. If you came for truth, close the door.
lines: Anwen has not slept since the first cart came back empty. She prays like someone bargaining, not mourning.
Spirits do not bleed like beasts. Brew Moon Oil before you go deeper.
The old sacrifice stones sit beyond the wet road. Do not touch the lichen with bare hands.

edric.name: Lord Edric Vargan
edric.greeting: My family paid for Greyfen's walls. Remember that before you spit at my boots.
lines: Yes, the signet is Vargan work. No, I did not spill that blood.
The ruins still keep our records. If guilt has a shape, you will find it under stone.

actions.label: Open the way to Castle Vargan.

rook.name: Rook
rook.greeting: Maps, rumors, and lies. Tonight even the lies are whispering.
lines: The old road bends twice where it should bend once. Follow the crows, not the mud.
A boy found black feathers under his pillow after the second death. His mother burned the bed.

widow_elna.name: Widow Elna
widow_elna.greeting: The bell rings at dusk. My Harl is dead, but he still calls.
lines: Find why the cemetery bell rings. Bring me cruelty or kindness, but bring me an answer.

blacksmith_tor.name: Blacksmith Tor
lines: Take scrap if you mean to trap something. Better iron breaks than bone.
I heard bells from the road last night. Cemetery bells, only the cemetery was still.

farmer_toma.name: Farmer Toma
farmer_toma.greeting: It took three sheep and one child screaming before anyone believed me.
lines: Nobody speaks near the shrine after dusk. Not since Anwen washed blood from the altar stones.
They say a black dog is killing stock. I say no dog opens a latch and leaves boot prints.
Find what hunts the fold. Bring proof, not village gossip.

actions.label: Tell the villagers the dog protected children.
Lie and claim the dog fled.

white_hart.name: The White Hart
white_hart.greeting: You walk on promises buried under your kind's roads.
lines: Kill me, and the village breathes while the wood turns to ash.
Free me, and truth will have teeth.
Bind me, and you inherit the old sin.
Expose them, and let human hands answer human crimes.
